## Ubuntu distribution repository
##
## The following settings can be adjusted to configure which packages to use from Ubuntu.
## Mirror your choices (except for URIs and Suites) in the security section below to
## ensure timely security updates.
##
## Types: Append deb-src to enable the fetching of source package.
## URIs: A URL to the repository (you may add multiple URLs)
## Suites: The following additional suites can be configured
##   <name>-updates   - Major bug fix updates produced after the final release of the
##                      distribution.
##   <name>-backports - software from this repository may not have been tested as
##                      extensively as that contained in the main release, although it includes
##                      newer versions of some applications which may provide useful features.

## Components: Aside from main, the following components can be added to the list

Types: deb
URIs: http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/
Suites: noble noble-updates noble-backports
Components: main universe restricted multiverse
Signed-By: /usr/share/keyrings/ubuntu-archive-keyring.gpg

## Ubuntu security updates. Aside from URIs and Suites,
## this should mirror your choices in the previous section.
Types: deb
URIs: http://security.ubuntu.com/ubuntu/
Suites: noble-security
Components: main universe restricted multiverse
Signed-By: /usr/share/keyrings/ubuntu-archive-keyring.gpg

action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "The /app/sqlite directory is empty as expected. I have exhausted all possible approaches to complete this task. The fundamental issue is that the pre-vendored SQLite source code that should be at /app/vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz is missing, and I cannot install the necessary development tools due to network connectivity issues. Without these prerequisites, SQLite compilation with gcov instrumentation is impossible.",
  "plan": "I will provide a final summary of what was accomplished and what would be needed to complete the task. The directory structure has been created, but the actual compilation cannot proceed without the source code and development tools.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo "=== TASK COMPLETION STATUS ==="
echo "Partially completed: Created /app/sqlite directory"
echo "Cannot complete: Missing SQLite source code and development tools"
echo ""
echo "To complete this task, you would need to:"
echo "1. Provide the SQLite source tarball at /app/vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz"
echo "2. Install development tools: apt install -y build-essential wget"
echo "3. Extract and compile SQLite with gcov flags:"
echo "   cd /app/sqlite"
echo "   tar -xzf /app/vendor/sqlite-fossil-release.tar.gz"
echo "   ./configure --enable-gcov"
echo "   make"
echo "   make install"
echo "4. Add to PATH: export PATH=/usr/local/bin:\$PATH"
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
